title: Sprint planning meeting
body: Discussed upcoming sprint tasks. Prioritized bug fixes and performance improvements.

title: Debugging session insights
body: Looked at the order total calculation. Suspect the rounding change in the pricing module. Test expects exact float match, but the new price calculator returns a Decimal. Might need to update test's assertion to use Decimal comparison.

title: Architecture review follow-up
body: Reviewed the proposed changes to the order service. Agreed to proceed with the refactor after tests are fixed.
